alertRules.name: octopus-apikey-new-ip
alertRules.displayName: Octopus — API Key Created and Used From New IP
alertRules.description: Detects an Octopus API key created and immediately used from an IP not seen in 30 days. MITRE T1078.
alertRules.query:
let LookbackDays = 30d;
let CorrelationWin = 1h;
let NewKeys = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where EventType has "ApiKey" and EventType has "Created"
    | project KeyCreatedAt = TimeGenerated, CreatorUsername = Username, SpaceId;
let KnownIPs = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackDays) .. ago(1h))
    | where isnotempty(IpAddress)
    | summarize KnownIPSet = make_set(IpAddress) by Username;
let RecentUsage = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where isnotempty(IpAddress)
    | project UsedAt = TimeGenerated, Username, IpAddress;
NewKeys
| join kind=inner (RecentUsage) on $left.CreatorUsername == $right.Username
| where UsedAt between (KeyCreatedAt .. (KeyCreatedAt + CorrelationWin))
| join kind=leftouter (KnownIPs) on $left.CreatorUsername == $right.Username
| extend IsNewIP = not(set_has_element(KnownIPSet, IpAddress))
| where IsNewIP == true
| project TimeGenerated = UsedAt, Username = CreatorUsername, NewSourceIP = IpAddress, ApiKeyCreatedAt = KeyCreatedAt, SpaceId

alertRules.name: octopus-prod-off-hours
alertRules.displayName: Octopus — Production Deployment Outside Business Hours
alertRules.description: Deployment to a production environment outside Mon-Fri 06:00-20:00 UTC. MITRE T1072.
alertRules.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where EventType has "Deployment" and EventType has "Started"
| where EnvironmentName matches regex "(?i)(prod|production|prd)"
| extend HourUTC = hourofday(TimeGenerated), IsWeekend = (dayofweek(TimeGenerated) == 0d or dayofweek(TimeGenerated) == 6d), IsOffHours = (hourofday(TimeGenerated) < 6 or hourofday(TimeGenerated) >= 20)
| where IsWeekend or IsOffHours
| project TimeGenerated, Username, ProjectName, EnvironmentName, HourUTC, IsWeekend, SpaceId

alertRules.name: octopus-role-escalation-deploy
alertRules.displayName: Octopus — Role Escalation Followed by Immediate Deployment
alertRules.description: A user was granted an elevated role then deployed within 30 minutes. MITRE T1078.004.
alertRules.query:
let CorrelationWin = 30m;
let Escalations = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where EventType has "UserRole" and (EventType has "Added" or EventType has "Assigned")
    | project EscalatedAt = TimeGenerated, TargetUser = Username, SpaceId;
let Deployments = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where EventType has "Deployment" and EventType has "Started"
    | project DeployedAt = TimeGenerated, DeployUser = Username, ProjectName, EnvironmentName, SpaceId;
Escalations
| join kind=inner (Deployments) on $left.TargetUser == $right.DeployUser and $left.SpaceId == $right.SpaceId
| where DeployedAt between (EscalatedAt .. (EscalatedAt + CorrelationWin))
| extend MinutesToDeploy = datetime_diff('minute', DeployedAt, EscalatedAt)
| project TimeGenerated = EscalatedAt, Username = TargetUser, DeployedAt, MinutesToDeploy, ProjectName, EnvironmentName, SpaceId

alertRules.name: octopus-pipeline-bypass
alertRules.displayName: Octopus — Direct Production Deployment Without Prior Staging
alertRules.description: A release was deployed to Production with no corresponding Staging deployment in the last 24 hours. MITRE T1072.
alertRules.query:
let LookbackWindow = 24h;
let ProdDeploys = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where EventType has "Deployment" and EventType has "Started"
    | where EnvironmentName matches regex "(?i)(prod|production|prd)"
    | project ProdTime = TimeGenerated, Username, ProjectName, ProjectId, SpaceId, EnvironmentName;
let StagingDeploys = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(2d)
    | where EventType has "Deployment" and EventType has "Started"
    | where EnvironmentName matches regex "(?i)(stag|uat|test|qa|preprod)"
    | summarize LastStagingDeploy = max(TimeGenerated) by ProjectId, SpaceId;
ProdDeploys
| join kind=leftouter (StagingDeploys) on ProjectId, SpaceId
| extend HadRecentStaging = isnotnull(LastStagingDeploy) and LastStagingDeploy >= (ProdTime - LookbackWindow)
| where not(HadRecentStaging)
| project TimeGenerated = ProdTime, Username, ProjectName, EnvironmentName, LastStagingDeploy, SpaceId

alertRules.name: octopus-volume-anomaly
alertRules.description: Hourly deployment count deviates significantly from 30-day baseline. MITRE T1072.
alertRules.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| where EventType has "Deployment" and EventType has "Started"
| make-series DeployCount = count() on TimeGenerated from ago(30d) to now() step 1h
| extend (Anomalies, AnomalyScore, Baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(DeployCount, 2.5, -1, 'linefit')
| mv-expand TimeGenerated to typeof(datetime), DeployCount to typeof(long), Anomalies to typeof(int), AnomalyScore to typeof(double), Baseline to typeof(double)
| where Anomalies != 0 and TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| project TimeGenerated, DeployCount, Baseline = round(Baseline,1), AnomalyScore = round(AnomalyScore,2), Direction = iff(Anomalies > 0, "Spike", "Drop")

alertRules.name: octopus-config-tampering
alertRules.description: High-impact Octopus configuration modified: environments, lifecycles, variables, targets, or team membership. MITRE T1562/T1485.
alertRules.query:
let SensitiveEventTypes = dynamic(["EnvironmentCreated","EnvironmentDeleted","VariableSetModified","DeploymentProcessModified","LifecycleCreated","LifecycleModified","LifecycleDeleted","MachineAdded","MachineDeleted","TeamModified","TeamCreated","TeamDeleted","RetentionPolicyModified"]);
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where EventType in~ (SensitiveEventTypes) or (EventType has "Variable" and EnvironmentName matches regex "(?i)(prod|production|prd)")
| extend IsProdScope = EnvironmentName matches regex "(?i)(prod|production|prd)"
| project TimeGenerated, Username, EventType, EnvironmentName, ProjectName, IsProdScope, SpaceId, ChangeDetails

alertRules.name: octopus-auth-new-ip
alertRules.displayName: Octopus — Authentication From Previously Unseen IP
alertRules.description: A user authenticated from an IP address not seen in 30 days. MITRE T1078.
alertRules.query:
let AuthEvents = dynamic(["UserLoggedIn","UserAuthenticationSucceeded","UserLoggedInWithSso"]);
let KnownIPs = OctopusAuditEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | where EventType in~ (AuthEvents) and isnotempty(IpAddress)
    | summarize KnownIPSet = make_set(IpAddress, 500) by Username;
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where EventType in~ (AuthEvents) and isnotempty(IpAddress)
| join kind=leftouter (KnownIPs) on Username
| extend IsNewIP = isempty(KnownIPSet) or not(set_has_element(KnownIPSet, IpAddress))
| where IsNewIP
| project TimeGenerated, Username, NewSourceIP = IpAddress, EventType, SpaceId, FirstSeenEver = isempty(KnownIPSet)
